## Type

- [ ] feat (user-visible new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] perf (performance)
- [ ] refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

- [ ]

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] If user-visible: `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] If editor decorations touched: tested on iPad / `(pointer: coarse)`
- [ ] If CSP-affecting (new domain, script, style): `vercel.json` updated
- [ ] If AI prompt or schema changed: `docs/AI_INTEGRATION.md` updated
